steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: The subject of the sentence is the gerund phrase "Having proportionally large populations." A gerund phrase functioning as a subject is treated as singular.

steps.title: Choose the singular verb
steps.content: A and C are plural present forms, so they do not agree with the singular gerund phrase. B is also plural and wrongly shifts to past tense for a general statement. The answer is D.
